events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: field-bent anchor bolts are judged **fail / high risk** — bending anchor rods to force alignment isn't an AISC 303 §7.5-approved remedy for out-of-tolerance anchor placement, it introduces stress risers that can crack the rod and skews base-plate bearing/plumb, and OSHA 1926.755 requires the anchorage condition be sound before erection proceeds. Recommended action is an EOR-reviewed fix (oversized holes, plate repair, or rod replacement) and reinspection before grouting/sign-off.
